qualityPolicy.notes: Checklist B (serial #12) keeps state-only accumulation and raises D-round density to at least 6 regex-patch operations per round

executionHints.description: Checklist B (serial #12) extends helperization across family literals and v4/v6 branch predicates with denser code-step deltas

d1ResetRequirement.notes: When run range includes D1, explicit reset avoids stale invocation state

D1.description: Extract family literals and route lookup/classify family assignments through helper functions

operations.replacement:
*family = wc_preclass_family_v4_literal();
		wc_preclass_assign_from_row(row, cls, rir, reason, confidence);

*family = wc_preclass_family_v6_literal();
		wc_preclass_assign_from_row(row, cls, rir, reason, confidence);

operations.pattern: if \(inet_pton\(AF_INET6, normalized, &addr6\) == 1\) \{\r?\n\t\tconst unsigned char\* b = addr6\.s6_addr;\r?\n\t\t\*family = "v6";

D2.description: Extract v4 branch predicates and route hot v4 special-address checks through predicate helpers

D3.description: Extract v6 branch predicates and route hot v6 checks through predicate helpers

D4.description: Route v4/v6 unknown and guessed-rir handling through dedicated helpers to maximize branch-level code deltas

operations.pattern:
if \(wc_preclass_v6_is_global_unicast_2000_3\(b\)\) \{?
			\*cls = "allocated";?
			\*reason = "V6_GLOBAL_UNICAST_2000_3";?
			const char\* guessed_rir = wc_guess_rir\(normalized\);?
			if \(guessed_rir && strcmp\(guessed_rir, "unknown"\) != 0\) \{?
				\*rir = guessed_rir;?
				\*confidence = "medium";?
			} else \{?
				\*rir = "unknown";?
				\*confidence = "low";?
			}?
			return;?
		}
